entrance_hall.name: Entrance Hall
entrance_hall.description: A grand staircase dominates the room. Portraits on the walls seem to watch your every move. There are doors leading to the kitchen and the library.

kitchen.name: Kitchen
kitchen.description: The smell of rotten food fills the air. Pots and pans hang from the ceiling, swaying gently despite the lack of wind. A large figure moves near the stove.

child_bedroom.name: Child's Bedroom
child_bedroom.description: Toys are scattered across the floor. A small bed sits in the corner, its sheets twisted into a knot. The air feels cold.

library.name: Library
library.description: Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves line the walls. Several books float open in mid-air, their pages turning on their own. A suit of armour stands in the corner.

study.name: Study
study.description: A dusty desk covered in old papers. A locked door leads deeper into the mansion. There is a chest in the corner.

master_bedroom.name: Master Bedroom
master_bedroom.description: A grand four-poster bed dominates the room. The mirror on the wall reflects something that isn't quite you.

pantry.name: Pantry
pantry.description: Shelves of old preserves line the walls. Most have burst open. Something has been nesting here.

basement_stairs.name: Basement Stairs
basement_stairs.description: A narrow staircase leads down into darkness. The door at the bottom looks very old. You feel uneasy.
